_README: Materials catalogue. Costs are delivered cost per unit unless noted. Aggregate prices are supplier-specific — `supplier` field tagged on each entry. Suppliers: Upland's Gravel (suffix `_uplands`, central Vancouver Island), Northwin Gravel (suffix `_northwin`), Browns River Pit (suffix `_brownsriver`, serves Courtenay / Comox / Cumberland). Pick the supplier closest to the job site.

lock_block_no1.name: Lock block (No. 1)
lock_block_no1.notes: 5 ft × 2.5 ft × 2.5 ft, ~5,000 lb each. Trucking: 16 blocks/load at $850/load (heavy haul). Use trucking key block_delivery.

lock_block_no2.name: Lock block (No. 2)
lock_block_no2.notes: 5 ft × 2.5 ft × 2.5 ft, ~5,000 lb each. Trucking: 16 blocks/load at $850/load (heavy haul). Use trucking key block_delivery.

magnum_stone_block.name: Magnum stone block (4 ft × 2 ft × 2 ft)
magnum_stone_block.notes: ~1,800 lb each. Trucking: 26 blocks/load at $850/load (heavy haul). Use trucking key block_delivery.

diesel.name: Diesel (fuel estimate)
diesel.notes: Per-litre rate at $2.25 (2026-04-25). For a quick dollar estimate, add a freeform Materials line instead — set quantity=1 and unit_cost=$600 (or whatever).

rip_rap_1_3ft_uplands.name: Rip rap 1-3 ft (Upland's)
rip_rap_1_3ft_uplands.notes: $39/cu_yd alternative if billed by volume. ~3/4 ton per 3-ft boulder for AI estimating.

rip_rap_3plus_uplands.name: Rip rap 3 ft+ (Upland's)
rip_rap_3plus_uplands.notes: $39/cu_yd alternative if billed by volume. ~3/4 ton per 3-ft boulder for AI estimating.

road_crush_34_brownsriver.name: 3/4" road crush (Browns River)
road_crush_34_brownsriver.notes: Range $23-24/cu_yd; using $23.50 midpoint. Serves Courtenay / Comox / Cumberland.

clear_blue_chip_brownsriver.name: Clear blue chip (Browns River)
clear_blue_chip_brownsriver.notes: Same price as standard blue chip ($63/cu_yd). Serves Courtenay / Comox / Cumberland.

drain_pipe.name: 4" perforated drain pipe (100 ft roll)
drain_pipe.notes: Sold in 100 ft rolls only. 1 roll covers any wall ≤ 100 ft. 2 rolls for 100-200 ft, etc.

filter_fabric.name: Filter fabric (roll)
filter_fabric.notes: Standard pricing for retaining walls < 50 ft. Bigger walls may need custom pricing — flag in quick notes.
